description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push and pull request events. Use a matrix strategy to test on multiple Linux distributions (Arch Linux, Rocky Linux, Debian, Fedora, Ubuntu, and Alpine) with different build types (Debug) and compilers (GNU). For each job, install Git, checkout the code, install dependencies, build and install ckb-next, run ckb-next-daemon --help, package ckb-next, and upload the package as a workflow artifact.
